title: codariocalyx gyrans var. roylei
intro: Codariocalyx gyrans var. roylei, also known as the 'dancing pepper plant', is a climbing plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, or used in the form of tinctures or powders for various medicinal purposes.
